species.citation: (Blanco) Fern.-Vill. , Fl. Filip., 3rd Ed. 4(Nov. App.) (1880) 40 ; Kanis, Blumea 16 (1968) 43; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 104; Fernando et al., Gard. Bull. Singapore 72 (2020) 261; Romeroso et al., J. Asia-Pacific biodiv. 17 (2024) 12; ≡ Ochna fascicularis Blanco , Fl. Filip., 2nd Ed. (1845) 245 ; Fl. Filip. ed. 3, 2 (1878) 92; S.Vidal, Sinopsis Atlas (1883) 19; Rev. Pl. Vasc. Filip. (1886) 79; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 68; Type: Vidal 1023 (L, neo; A, isoneo), Luzon: Bulacan, Angat.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. BUCAS GRANDE (photos), CATANDUANES, DINAGAT, HOMONHON, LUZON: Albay, Aurora, Bulacan, Camarines Norte, Isabela, Laguna, Quezon, Rizal, Zambales, MANICANI, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Davao Oriental, Surigao del Norte, POLILLO, SAMAR, SIBUYAN.

species.citation: (Elmer) Furtado , Gard. Bull. Straits Settlem. 19 (1962) 184; ≡ Brackenridgea palustris ssp. foxworthyi (Elmer) Kanis , Blumea 16 (1968) 48 ; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 102; ≡ Ochna foxworthyi Elmer , LPB 5 (1913) 1823 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 68; Type: Elmer 13074 (GH, lecto; A, L, MO, NA, NY, U, US), Palawan: Puerto Princesa, Mt Pulgar, Apr-1911.
species.notes: Lowlands, along river in forest or rocky hillside near riverbank. 0-590m.

species.citation: (Merr.) Fernando , Gard. Bull. Singapore 72 (2020) 267; ≡ Brackenridgea fascicularis ssp. mindanaensis (Merr.) Kanis , Blumea 16 (1968) 44 ; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 104; ≡ Ouratea mindanaensis Merr. , PJS 17 (1920) 287 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 68; Type: BS 34479 Ramos & Pascasio (A, lecto; K, L, P, US, isolecto), Mindanao: Surigao, Apr-1919.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Surigao del Norte.

species.citation: (Gaertn.) Bittrich & M.C.E.Amaral , Taxon 43 (1994) 92; ≡ Gomphia serrata (Gaertn.) Kanis , Taxon 16 (1967) 422 ; Blumea 16 (1968) 33; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 105; ≡ Meesia serrata Gaertn. , Fruct. Sem. Pl. 1 (1788) 344. = Gomphia angustifolia Vahl , Symb. Bot. (Vahl) 2 (1791) 49; ≡ Ouratea angustifolia (Vahl) Baill. ex Laness. , Pl. Util. Col. Franç. (1886) 667 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 68.
species.distribution: Borneo, China, India, Indochina, Malay Peninsula, Philippines, Sri Lanka, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand. BALABAC, BUSUANGA, CULION, GUIMARAS, LUZON: Apayao (photos), Aurora, Cagayan, Camarines, Ilocos Norte, Isabela, Quezon, Zambales, MASBATE, MINDANAO, MINDORO, NEGROS, PALAWAN, PANAY, ROMBLON, SIBUYAN, TABLAS.
